name_en: .🌷《With full set of original green box packaging》🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag
name_cn:
.🌷《With full set of original green box packaging》🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag
Presenting the new Gucci Horsebit 1955 series handbags, interpreting the double-ring and rectangular design that inherits the brand's equestrian roots, under the vision of Creative Director Sabato De Sarno for the Qixi Valentine's Day campaign. This small shoulder bag is crafted from new GG canvas, featuring a unique heat-pressed pattern for a delicate look and a soft, refined touch.
Exclusive for Mainland China, Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan
Beige and dark brown GG canvas, soft and refined touch
Gucci Rosso Ancora leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front detail: Horsebit
Side details: Half horsebit
Interior: 3 open pockets, 1 zip pocket
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Flap closure
Model: 815178.
Dimensions: 25.9cm (L) x 17.5cm (W) x 9.9cm (D)
Color: Burgundy full grain/Original leather.
Made in Italy
